query:
-- Fix S1UMCO4 (AspleySCout): BI00631 3ch SIP Inbound $27 → BI00633 3ch SIP Outbound $159
UPDATE service_billing_assignments SET billingItemExternalId = 'BI00633', assignmentMethod = 'manual' WHERE serviceExternalId = 'S1UMCO4' AND billingItemExternalId = 'BI00631';

-- Also fix the inbound service SXQLTTS (AspleySCin) - check it's on the inbound item
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, sba.billingItemExternalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.externalId = 'SXQLTTS';

-- Also fix the inbound service SXQLTTS (AspleySCin) - check it's on the inbound item
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, sba.billingItemExternalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.externalId = 'SXQLTTS';
